---
description: Deploy with weak instructions
---

## Name
Bad_Plugin:weak-deploy

## Synopsis
```text
/Bad_Plugin:weak-deploy
```

## Description
A deployment command with vague, hedging instructions that a linter
should flag.

## Implementation
<!-- skillsaw-assert content-weak-language -->
Try to run the deployment script if possible.
<!-- skillsaw-assert content-weak-language -->
You should probably check the logs for errors.
<!-- skillsaw-assert content-tautological -->
Write clean code and follow best practices.
<!-- skillsaw-assert content-weak-language -->
Consider using a manual review before pushing to production.
